title: Floor Harp Studio Explorer

required_before_public: Final 22-string note/gauge/tension schedule from supplier data.
Total string load estimate and structural review of neck, pillar, base, and soundboard load path.
Tuning pin scrap test for pilot size, torque, and holding power.
Staged pitch-up log with frame movement measurements.
Sourceability check for harp strings, pins, and long clear hardwood.
Browser-renderable CAD or drawing export when geometry authority is ready.

notes: Explorer is a documentation surface and does not upgrade the packet beyond L2.
The design workbook is retained as legacy design-table evidence; README.md and design.md define the current 22-string prototype boundary.
No measured prototype data, reviewed CAD, or sourceability check is present yet.
